taskDescription: Complete the crossword on the Spinal Cord

words.clue: Cone-shaped terminal end of the spinal cord
Bundle of lumbar and sacral nerve roots below the conus medullaris
Spinal cord enlargement supplying the upper limb via brachial plexus (C4-T1)
Slender thread of pia mater extending from conus to coccyx
Spinal cord syndrome with ipsilateral motor loss and contralateral pain/temperature loss
Column present only at T1-L2 containing sympathetic preganglionic neurons
Deep longitudinal groove on the anterior surface of the spinal cord
Nucleus at T1-L2 that gives origin to the posterior spinocerebellar tract

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
Good effort! Review the areas you missed.
